facebook.caption:
4.5 stars. 319 reviews. HD cafe is earning every single one.

Local coffee spot on Khu 1 that actually delivers. No gimmicks, no tourist markup. Just solid coffee and a room full of regulars who know what's good.

Priced at $15-30 a person. Worth every dong.

Save this for your Phu Quoc trip.
facebook.video_caption: Watch the barista work at HD cafe, Phú Quốc. 319 people rated this 4.5 stars and the vibe makes it obvious why. Local energy, real coffee, zero pretense.
